posts.title: Quebec returns unopened American liquor, presumably banished to a cool, dark place for the past year, to the shelves "before it expires" 😂🤣. posts.title: Poor kid is feeling unloved: Eileen Gu, who instead of competing for America, chose to compete for China in the Olympics is disappointed that the Milan Cortina Olympic organizers are not giving her more practice time.
